nodes.label: OTA Firmware Architecture
nodes.rationale: Defines the full OTA update architecture for STM32L476RG: hardware constraints, FRAM layout, bootloader design, state machine, protocol, and phased roadmap. Design principles: fail-safe first, atomic commit, minimal RAM, separation of concerns, idempotent operations, device-initiated only.

nodes.label: STM32L476RG MCU
nodes.rationale: Cortex-M4F, 1 MB Flash (dual-bank), 128 KB SRAM. Flash layout: 32 KB bootloader at 0x08000000, 480 KB application at 0x08008000, 512 KB Bank 2 reserved. SRAM1 96 KB for application, SRAM2 32 KB for OTA flags.

nodes.label: CY15B116QN FRAM (2 MB)
nodes.rationale: 2 MB SPI FRAM, byte-addressable, unlimited write endurance, no erase cycle. First 1 MB: DB ring buffer (0x000000-0x0FDFFF) + Config Sector (0x0FE000) + OtaControlBlock. Second 1 MB: OTA staging (0x100000-0x1FFFFF) with header, image data, download bitmap.

nodes.label: SIMCom A7670E LTE Modem
nodes.rationale: TLS 1.2 modem. Uses AT+HTTP* service only (no CCH/AT+CCH*). SSL context 0 shared by upload and download. Known issue: cert files must be PEM with -----BEGIN/-----END headers despite *_der.c filenames.

nodes.label: OtaControlBlock_t (shared/ota_control_block.h)
nodes.rationale: 64-byte packed struct at FRAM config sector offset +0x80. Fields: magic (0x0AC0FFEE), ota_pending, ota_tried (max 3 attempts), ota_confirmed, image_size, image_sha256 (32 bytes), fw_version, download_timestamp, block_crc32. Dual-copy for power-loss tolerance. Compiled into both application and bootloader via BOOTLOADER_BUILD ifdef.

nodes.label: FRAM Address Constants (shared/fram_addresses.h)
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth for all FRAM addresses. Also contains FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX = 480*1024 (Phase 3.2). Compiled into both application and bootloader environments.

nodes.label: OTA State Machine
nodes.rationale: 8 states: IDLE â†’ POLLING_VERSION â†’ (W>0: wait/retry) â†’ DOWNLOADING â†’ DOWNLOAD_COMPLETE â†’ VERIFIED â†’ REBOOT_PENDING â†’ CONFIRMING â†’ IDLE. State persisted in OtaControlBlock_t in FRAM. Rollout gate: W.seconds from server. Rollback: ota_tried>=3 or IWDG timeout before ota_confirm_success().

nodes.label: Bootloader Design
nodes.rationale: Separate PlatformIO env at 0x08000000 (32 KB), no FreeRTOS. Reads OCB from FRAM, validates image_size <= FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX, verifies SHA-256, programs Flash page-by-page with IWDG refresh, D-cache reset before each memcmp verify, I-cache reset after all pages written. SP sanity check before jump. RDP Level 1 + write protection on pages 0-15.

nodes.label: OtaManagerTask (Src/ota_manager_task.c)
nodes.rationale: FreeRTOS task (BelowNormal priority, 1024 words stack). Woken by xTaskNotify from ssluploadtask after each upload. Implements full OTA state machine. Builds device ID as region%1000:station%1000. Appends ?id=rrrsss to all OTA URLs. Parses V.#####:L.$$$$$$$:H.<sha256>:W.<seconds> response. Gates on W: W>0 returns to IDLE.

nodes.label: OTA Image Writer (Src/ota_image_writer.c)
nodes.rationale: Handles chunked FRAM write + download bitmap. API: oiw_begin, oiw_write_chunk, oiw_chunk_received, oiw_finalize, oiw_resume_info. 1 KB bitmap at 0x17F000 supports resume after power loss.

nodes.label: A7670 SSL Downloader (lib/A7670/a7670_ssl_downloader.c)
nodes.rationale: Chunked GET via AT+HTTP* service. Static buffers: s_chunk_read_buf[516] + s_cmd_buf[224] = 740 bytes. Returns SSL_DL_ERR_CRC on CRC mismatch, SSL_DL_ERR_HTTP on HTTP error (including 429). Rewritten for AT+HTTP* in Phase 2.1.

nodes.label: A7670 HTTPS Uploader (lib/A7670/a7670_https_uploader.c)
nodes.rationale: POST flow via AT+HTTP*: HTTPINIT -> HTTPPARA URL+CONTENT+SSLCFG -> HTTPDATA -> DOWNLOAD prompt -> binary body -> HTTPACTION=1 -> +HTTPACTION URC. 512 B fetch window (28 records/batch). Created in Phase 2.1 to replace deleted a7670_ssl_uploader.c.

nodes.label: CRC-32/MPEG-2 (shared/crc32.c)
nodes.rationale: Software CRC-32/MPEG-2 (poly 0x04C11DB7, init 0xFFFFFFFF, no reflection, no final XOR). 1 KB lookup table in Flash. HW CRC not used (locked to CRC-16/Modbus by modbus_init). Used for per-chunk transport integrity. Compiled into both application and bootloader.

nodes.label: SHA-256 (shared/sha256.c)
nodes.rationale: Standalone FIPS 180-4 SHA-256, no mbedTLS dependency. Accumulated during download per chunk. Bootloader re-verifies before Flash programming. Sole whole-image integrity check. Compiled into both application and bootloader.

nodes.label: WatchdogTask (Src/watchdog_task.c)
nodes.rationale: High priority FreeRTOS task (500 ms period, 256 words stack). Per-task heartbeat API; every task must call wdt_kick() within 500 ms. Refreshes IWDG. Fires IWDG if new app hangs before ota_confirm_success() within 60 s -> bootloader rollback.

nodes.label: Boot Flash Driver (bootloader/src/boot_flash.c)
nodes.rationale: Bootloader Flash programmer. Page erase + 64-bit writes + read-back memcmp verify for Bank1 pages 16-255. IWDG refresh per page. D-cache reset before each memcmp. I-cache reset after all pages written. page_buf declared as static uint64_t for 8-byte alignment.

nodes.label: Boot FRAM Driver (bootloader/src/boot_fram.c)
nodes.rationale: Polling SPI1 FRAM read for bootloader. No DMA, no interrupts, no FreeRTOS. WREN + READ + WRITE opcodes.

nodes.label: OTA Version Check Protocol
nodes.rationale: Plain-text protocol: V.#####:L.$$$$$$$:H.<sha256hex>:W.<seconds> in HTML body. Device scans for regex pattern. Missing W. treated as W.0 (backward compat). UPDATE_PATH = /api/v1/weather (Option B). Device identity: ?id=rrrsss where r=region%1000, s=station%1000.

nodes.label: OTA Chunk Download Protocol
nodes.rationale: GET <UPDATE_PATH>/get_firmware?offset=<byte_offset>&length=<bytes>&id=<rrrsss>. Response: <length> bytes + 4-byte little-endian CRC-32/MPEG-2 trailer. 429 on out-of-slot. Retry up to 3x per chunk. Resume via FRAM download bitmap.

nodes.label: FreeRTOS Task Architecture
nodes.rationale: Tasks: DataCollectionTask (Normal/512w), UploadTask (BelowNormal/1024w), OtaManagerTask (BelowNormal/1024w, notified by UploadTask), ModemTask (AboveNormal/768w), WatchdogTask (High/256w). Total stack ~14.3 KB. Inter-task: xTaskNotify UploadTask->OtaManagerTask; xQueueSend to ModemTask; g_fram_spi_mutex for FRAM access.

nodes.label: Mutex Strategy
nodes.rationale: Two mutexes: g_fram_spi_mutex (all SPI1/FRAM, ALWAYS FIRST), g_ota_state_mutex (OtaControlBlock_t RMW, always second). Violating acquisition order causes deadlock.

nodes.label: Internal Flash Layout
nodes.rationale: 0x08000000: Bootloader 32 KB (pages 0-15, Bank 1, RDP1+WRP). 0x08008000: Application 480 KB (pages 16-255, Bank 1). 0x08080000: Bank 2 512 KB reserved for future dual-bank atomic swap. FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX = 480*1024 enforced by both device firmware and server upload.

nodes.label: Flash Cache Management (Â§9.4)
nodes.rationale: STM32L476 ART Accelerator has ICACHE and DCACHE (not ARM Cortex-M7 SCB caches). Both enabled by default. Failure modes: stale D-cache during read-back verify; stale I-cache after jump. Required: disable/reset/enable DCACHE before each memcmp; disable/reset/enable ICACHE after all pages written.

nodes.label: ota_confirm_success()
nodes.rationale: Called by new app within 60 seconds of boot to confirm successful OTA. Sets ota_confirmed=1, ota_pending=0 in OCB. If not called, IWDG fires and bootloader rolls back to previous firmware.

nodes.label: Risk Register
nodes.rationale: R-1 through R-15 mostly RESOLVED. Only R-12 remains open: cert arrays compiled with *_der.c names but must be PEM format. Risk: silent cert corruption on modem FS. Fix: verify -----BEGIN header in each cert array.

nodes.label: Design Decisions (Q-1 through Q-8)
nodes.rationale: All resolved: Q-1 copy-in-place, Q-2 CRC-32+SHA-256, Q-3 background download, Q-4 60s confirm window, Q-5 private CA mTLS, Q-6 plain-text protocol, Q-7 standalone sha256 (no mbedTLS), Q-8 twice daily check.
